audiocpp_server --config <server.json> [--host <ip>] [--port <port>] [--backend <backend>]
                [--device <id>] [--threads <n>]
                [--log] [--log-file <path>]
  --backend cpu|cuda|vulkan|metal  default cuda

Endpoints:
  GET  /health
  GET  /v1/models
  GET  /v1/audio/voices?model=<id>
  POST /v1/audio/speech
  POST /v1/audio/transcriptions
  POST /v1/tasks/run
